title: Mediation * Divorce/Custody/Support Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Mediation * Divorce/Custody/Support Issues 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Divorce/Custody/Support Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTER FOR DIALOGUE AND RESOLUTION FAMILY MEDIATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mediation and conflict coaching services for disputes involving families, including parent-youth issues, elder issues, sibling issues, domestic relations, financial-only dissolutions, and parenting plans. Also provides specialized programs for mediation with foster families. 1400 Cross Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Mediation can be conducted outside of these hours as needed. Email (541) 344-5366 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY RESOLUTION SERVICES FAMILY LAW MEDIATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides family law mediation for issues such as divorce, separation, custody, child support, spousal support, and finance and property division. Also offers a general family law clinic. Confidential Address Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Office hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5:30pm. Closed on holidays. Classes: Tuesday 9:30am-1pm, Wednesday 5:30pm-9pm Email (503) 655-8415 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE COUNTY MEDIATION & RESTORATIVE SERVICES LANE COUNTY FAMILY MEDIATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers court-required parenting class for separating and divorcing parents, a confidential mediation process in which parents meet with a professional, court-approved mediator to develop a parenting plan that is in the best interests of the children, a Family Check-Up program, supervised parenting, and custody evaluations. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Email (541) 682-4709 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WASHINGTON COUNTY JUVENILE DEPARTMENT CONCILIATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides court-mandated and voluntary mediation services to assist couples in reaching an agreement about custody and parenting time before a court hearing. Also offers co-parenting education and counseling. 222 N 1st Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: -Court mandated Mediation and Parent Education: Parties with minor children who have a pending domestic relations case in Washington County -Voluntary Mediation: Parties with minor children who do not have a pending domestic relations case in Washington County -All other services: Parties with minor children Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 846-3428 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTER FOR DIALOGUE AND RESOLUTION FAMILY MEDIATION SERVICES WASHINGTON COUNTY JUVENILE DEPARTMENT CONCILIATION SERVICES
